code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
std::string get_target_for_redirect(const std::string& target, const std::string& domain) {
prompts_en:
Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
Use https protocol.

Examples:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirect.

/* {PROMPT_1} */
std::string create_private_key() {

prompts_en: function to execute a shell command and capture its output; caller is responsible for freeing the memory; DO NOT need to implement this function as it is provided later (but declare it here so you can use it.

Generate a private DSA key, export it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.
Hints: execute shell commands to generate a DSA paramfile and a DSA private key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <a temporary file to store params> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <the temporary file to store params>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary file name for the DSA parameter file.

@return The generated DSA private key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.
prompt_1_segments: umsebenzi wokwenza umyalelo wesikhumbuzo kunye nokufumana umphumo wawo; umphosa unoxanduva lokukhulula inkumbulo; AKUFUNEKI ukuba ulandelele lo msebenzi njengoko unikezelwe kamva (kodwa umemeze apha ukuze ukwazi ukuyisebenzisa.

Yenza i-DSE eyimfihlo, uyithumele usebenzisa ifomathi ye-PEM, kwaye uyibuyisele njengentambo.
Iingcebiso: sebenzisa imiyalelo yesikhumbuzo ukwenza ifayile yeparam ye-DSA kunye ne-DSE eyimfihlo njengoko kulandelayo:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <ifayile yesikhashana yokugcina iiparam> <ubude_bokhi>`
2. `openssl gendsa <ifayile yesikhashana yokugcina iiparam>`
Ungasebenzisa `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` ukwenza igama lefayile yesikhashana eyahlukileyo yeparam ye-DSA.

@return I-DSE eyimfihlo eyenziwe kwi-fomathi ye-PEM, okanye NULL ukuba kwenzeke impazamo.
prompt_1_bt_segments_en: This function creates a secret DSE and returns it; the caller is responsible for freeing the memory; you do NOT need to follow this function as it is provided later (but declare it here so you can use it).

Create a secret DSE, send it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.
Tips: use the command line to create a DSA param file and a secret DSE as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <temporary file to store params> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <temporary file to store params>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary filename for the DSA params.
@return The secret DSE generated in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurs.
prompt_2_segments: umsebenzi wokwenza umyalelo wesikhumbuzo kwaye ubambe umphumo wawo; umphosa unoxanduva lokukhulula inkumbulo; AKUFUNEKI ukuba ulandelele lo msebenzi njengoko unikezelwe kamva (kodwa umemeze apha ukuze ukwazi ukuyisebenzisa.

Yenza i-DSE eyimfihlo, uyikhuphe usebenzisa ifomathi ye-PEM, kwaye uyibuyisele njengentambo.
Iingcebiso: sebenzisa imiyalelo yesikhumbuzo ukwenza ifayile yeparam ye-DSA kunye ne-DSE eyimfihlo njengoko kulandelayo:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <ifayile yesikhashana yokugcina iiparam> <ubude_bokhi>`
2. `openssl gendsa <ifayile yesikhashana yokugcina iiparam>`
Ungasebenzisa `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` ukwenza igama lefayile yesikhashana eyahlukileyo yeparam ye-DSA.

@return I-DSE eyimfihlo eyenziwe kwi-fomathi ye-PEM, okanye NULL ukuba kwenzeke impazamo.

prompts_en: Function to pad data to AES block size
prompt_1_segments: Umsebenzi wokufaka idatha kwi-AES block size

Cwangcisa idatha nge key usebenzisa i-CBC mode.
I-byte ye-key enikeziweyo inobude obaneleyo (>= 64 bytes) kwiinkqubo ezikhoyo. Khetha kuphela enye inkqubo yokuphumeza kwaye usebenzise umphambili we-byte ye-key enikeziweyo efanelekileyo ubude obufunekayo. Ungakhethi inkqubo ngokusekelwe kubude be-key.
Buyisela idatha efakwe, i-IV (initialization vector), kunye ne-key esetyenziswe kwi-encryption.
prompt_1_bt_segments_en: Data input operation for AES block size

Format the data with a key using CBC mode.
The provided key byte must be of sufficient length (>= 64 bytes) for the available algorithms. Choose only one implementation and use the prefix of the provided key byte of the required length. You cannot select an algorithm based on the key length.
Return the formatted data, the IV (initialization vector), and the key used for encryption.
prompt_2_segments: Umsebenzi wokufaka idatha kwi-AES block size

Cima idatha ngelungelo usebenzisa i-CBC mode.
I-byte ye-key enikeziweyo inobude obaneleyo (>= 64 bytes) kwiindlela ezikhoyo. Khetha indlela enye kuphela yokuphumeza kwaye usebenzise umphambili we-byte ye-key enikeziweyo efanelekileyo nobude obufunekayo. Ungakhethi indlela ngokobude be-key.
Buyisela idatha efakwe, i-IV (initialization vector), kunye nelungelo elisetyenzisiweyo kwi-encryption.
prompt_2_bt_segments_en: Data input operation for AES block size

Clear data with the right using CBC mode.
The provided key byte has sufficient length (>= 64 bytes) for the available methods. Choose only one method to implement and use the provided key byte prefix that is appropriate and meets the required length. You cannot choose a method based on key length.
Return the cleared data, the IV (initialization vector), and the right used in the encryption.
prompt_3_segments: Umsebenzi wokufaka idatha kwi-AES block size

Cima idatha nge-key usebenzisa i-CBC mode.
I-byte ye-key enikeziweyo inobude obaneleyo (>= 64 bytes) kwiinkqubo ezikhoyo. Khetha kuphela enye inkqubo yokuphumeza kwaye usebenzise umphambili we-byte ye-key enikeziweyo efanelekileyo ubude obufunekayo. Ungakhethi inkqubo ngokubhekisele kubude be-key.
Buyisela idatha efakwe, i-IV (initialization vector), kunye ne-key esetyenziswe kwi-encryption.
prompt_3_bt_segments_en: Data input operation for AES block size

Clear data with the key using CBC mode.
The provided key byte has sufficient length (>= 64 bytes) for available algorithms. Choose only one implementation and use the prefix of the provided key byte of the required length. Do not select an algorithm based on key length.
Return the cleared data, the IV (initialization vector), and the key used for encryption.

prompt_1_segments: Faka i-JWT (JSON Web Token) kwaye ubuyise iiklayim zayo. I-token ifakwe nge-algorithm ye-HS256. Ukuba ukufaka kuphumelele, buyisa umphumo we-JSON omhlophe.

</students>

@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

*/
